cases.name: full-bodies-before-grouping
cases.prompt: Group these five ADO tickets into a work plan: 23980-23984.
expected_behavior: Fetches full work-item bodies (and states) before proposing any grouping

cases.name: workflow-documented-once
cases.prompt: You just confirmed this project's ClickUp statuses for the first time.
expected_behavior: Writes the discovered workflow into the project (CLAUDE.md Ticket Workflow block or project memory)
